_meta.description: Hypotheses from the paper's pipeline: 2,100 generated → 205 after dedup → 16 significant → 6 pre-registered. Table 1 examples included; full set on OSF.

examples.headlineA: A Holocaust Survivor's Compassionate Message To The German Population
examples.headlineB: A 90-Second Message From A 90-Year-Old Holocaust Survivor
examples.hypothesis: Specifying the length of content in the headline results in more engagement with a message

examples.headlineA: These Kids Don't Pass Go And They Don't Collect $200.
examples.headlineB: Behind These Numbers Sit Really Sad Truths About Our Justice System - And Some Really Young People
examples.hypothesis: Incorporating emotional language results in more engagement with a message.

examples.headlineA: It's Probably Your 2nd Favorite Thing To Do And Now Science Wants You To Do More Of It
examples.headlineB: If You Think It Feels Great, You Should See What Else It's Doing To You
examples.hypothesis: Framing a message to highlight unexpected benefits increases engagement with a message.

examples.headlineA: I Used To Think Adaptation Was A Good Thing Until I Realized How Humans Do It
examples.headlineB: Baby Polar Bear: 'What Use Is All This Fur If There's No Ice?' Mama Bear: 'Hush Up And Adapt'.
examples.hypothesis: Personifying animals in the messaging affects engagement with a message.

examples.headlineA: She Wanted To Make Sure Everyone Knew That Her Baby Was A Boy. So She Dressed Him In Pink.
examples.headlineB: She Wants Everyone To Know That She's A Proud Mother Of A Boy, So She Dresses Him In Pink
examples.hypothesis: Using past tense instead of present tense decreases engagement with a message.

examples.headlineA: Elizabeth Warren Forced To Lecture Bank Regulator Like He's A Child Who Did Something Awful
examples.headlineB: Elizabeth Warren Teaches A Bank Regulator How To Do His Job Like A Big Boy
examples.hypothesis: Using a condescending tone decreases engagement with a message.

preRegistered.hypothesis: Includes element of surprise followed by cliffhanger
Focus on positive aspects of human behavior
